metadata.name: Apply Loyalty Points to an Order

description: A customer wants to use their loyalty points to get a discount on their current purchase.

nodes.task_description: Check the customer's available loyalty points balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer has enough points for a discount.

nodes.task_description: Apply the point redemption as a discount to the customer's shopping cart.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the discount to the order total.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's loyalty point balance to reflect the points that were used.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly deducts the redeemed points from the customer's account.
